message:
fix(tui): resolve compilation errors in threads.rs

Fix borrow checker error in toggle_selected_expansion by copying msg.id
before mutable borrow. Remove unreachable wildcard pattern. Remove
duplicate tree_item_to_widget_node definition (keeping the version with
render_plain_label).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
